A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Wanted: Accomodation in Vrindavan

Social · asked by user [] · 2007-10-19 · 0 answers
Hare Krishna

Please accept our humble obeisances. Jay Srila Prabhupada!

My mother and I are looking for a place to stay in Vrindavan for 3 months, 12 of February 2008 to 11 of May 2008.
We need a simple, peaceful place, neat and clean with kitchen/cooking facilities and attached bathroom. It doesn'92t have to be very close to ISKCON. We don'92t need luxury and we are ready to pay a reasonable price.

Do you know some place? We are happy for all suggestions and advice.
Please contact us as soon as possible: sunniva@justemail.net or amrtalila@ownmail.net

Haribol!
Bhn. Sunniva
